elements.figure-2411-013: \includegraphics[width=\linewidth]{phasediagram3.pdf} \caption{Phase diagram of the extended attractive SU(3) Hubbard chain with strong on-site attractive interaction at half-filling, obtained by perturbation theory. At the transition between the PS and TLL state, the ground state of the system is the $\eta$-clustering state. From the TLL into the CDW phase or vice versa, the transition is of BKT type.
